## Milestone

## Definition of Done (from CONTRIBUTING.md)

- [ ] Code follows `STYLEGUIDE.md` and the import rules in `ARCHITECTURE.md`
- [ ] New behavior tested at the right layer; `./check` green locally
- [ ] Docs updated in this PR (module docs / guides / ADRs affected by the change)
- [ ] Milestone status file ticked/annotated if an acceptance criterion advanced
- [ ] User-visible strings `_()`-wrapped
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or an accepted ADR authorizes them)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Commits follow conventions and carry DCO sign-off
